subcodes.first_line: O companions and helpers of Abdu'l-Baha! From shore to shore the ocean is surging and heaving, tumultuous and tempestuous [3.5s]... ...You have asked in whose name the real estate and buildings donated should be registered with the Government and the legal deeds issued: they should be registered in the name of Mirza Shoghi Rabbani
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و یاوران عبدالبهاء از کران تا کران آبست و در موج و اضطرابست و طوفان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universal peace; world unity, @stories; anecdotes
